user_question: gia đình ông/bà PHẠM VĂN LONG có thiếu nước sạch không?

query_plan.original_question: Gia đình ông/bà PHẠM VĂN LONG có bao nhiêu hộ nghèo thiếu nước sạch

sql: SELECT "deprivation.cleanWater" AS clean_water, "family.hostName" AS host_name, "family.code" AS household_id, "administrative.district" AS district, "administrative.commune" AS commune, SUM(CASE WHEN "classify" = 'Hộ nghèo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS poor_household_count FROM households WHERE LOWER("family.hostName") = 'phạm văn long' AND LOWER("classify") = 'hộ nghèo' AND "deprivation.cleanWater" = True AND "administrative.year" = 2024 GROUP BY clean_water, host_name, household_id, district, commune LIMIT 100

warnings.message: Truy vấn trả về kết quả rỗng.
